name: GPIBOnError
title: GPIBOnError
syntax: GPIBOnError (long deviceDescriptor, char query[], char response[], long status, long error);
description: This optional function is called if a query or a write operation (GPIBWriteStr or GPIBWriteNum) raised an error condition.

Users may implement this function and then receive the original query string or the data to be written, respectively. The result string, if any, is also returned, as well as the GPIB status word, the error code and the device descriptor.

parameters.name: deviceDescriptor
parameters.description: The descriptor of the device that transmitted the response.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The data transmitted in the failed GPIBQuery… or GPIBWrite… call, respectively

parameters.name: response
parameters.description: The data received from the device so far. The empty string if a write operation failure is reported.

description: The GPIBOnError callback function is used very much like GPIBResponse. Refere to it for an example.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
